videoSnippet.title: Can't Spell Pentala Without "Tal" || Harikrishna vs Daniel Dardha || FIDE World Cup 2025
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
Photos by Michal_Walusza

Harikrishna, Pentala (2697) - Dardha, Daniel (2605)
FIDE World Cup 2025 (Chess.com) [03-01] 2025.11.07
B66 Sicilian, Richter-Rauzer, Rauzer attack, 7...a6

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 Nc6 6.Bg5 e6 7.Qd2 a6 8.Nxc6 bxc6 9.O-O-O Be7 10.Bxf6 gxf6 11.Bc4 Bb7 12.Rhe1 Qa5 13.Kb1 Qc5 14.Bb3 d5 15.Na4 Qa7 16.c4 Rd8 17.cxd5 cxd5 18.Nc3 dxe4 19.Ba4+ Kf8 20.Qh6+ Kg8 21.Rxd8+ Bxd8 22.Re3 Bc7 23.Nxe4 Bxe4+ 24.Rxe4 f5 25.Rxe6

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:00 Game starts!
02:20 CNG
06:50 Pause The Video!
07:30 It Was in This Position!
09:50 Legends of The Channel
